chatbot.welcome: Hello! I am your APEX Assistant. How can I help you navigate the system today?

toast.loginDescription: You have been logged in successfully.
toast.loginNoPlan: Please choose a plan to continue.
toast.accountCreatedDescription: Please choose a plan to get started.
toast.subscriptionActivatedDescription: You can now start creating projects.
toast.confirmationDescription: Please check your email to confirm the plan switch.
toast.planSwitchedDescription: Your subscription limits have been updated.
toast.resetLinkSent: If the email exists, a reset link was sent.
toast.networkError: Network error, please check your connection
